A Developer’s Story

The thought processes behind the projects.

What's in here?

This Wiki is the story behind my projects. This is where I reveal the thought processes behind my projects. Unlike the READMEs, this is not a technical page. Rather, this is a collection of stories behind what I have build. My goal is to give you a glimpse into how the projects I have worked on have shaped my thought process.

Acknowledgements

All the images used, unless otherwise specified, were generated by the SDXL model trained by Stability AI under the CreativeML Open RAIL++-M License dated July 26, 2023. The use of this AI generated artwork is in the hopes of showcasing the power developers can harness when using the right tools, in the right way.
